name: Great Wildebeest Migration - Serengeti Crossing

name: Great Migration - Calving Season Ndutu
desc: 500,000 calves born on the Ndutu plains in just weeks, attracting predators.

name: Flamingo Gathering - Lake Nakuru

name: Mountain Gorilla Trekking - Volcanoes

name: Elephant Migration - Amboseli

desc: Thousands of humpback whales gather in Samana Bay to mate and calve.

name: Humpback Whale - Tonga

name: Whale Shark Season - Ningaloo

name: Coral Spawning - Great Barrier Reef

name: Orangutan Viewing - Borneo

name: Firefly Synchronization - Kuala Selangor
desc: Fireflies synchronize their flashing along the Selangor River mangroves.

name: Amazon Pink River Dolphin

name: Penguin Colony - Punta Tombo

name: Andean Condor Viewing - Colca Canyon
desc: Andean condors soar on thermals at Cruz del Condor viewpoint.

name: Spectacled Bear Watching - Machu Picchu

name: Capybara Gathering - Los Llanos
desc: Massive capybara herds and caimans gather around shrinking waterholes in dry season.

name: Deer Rut - Richmond Park
desc: Red and fallow deer rutting season with bellowing stags in Richmond Park.

desc: Iberian lynx sightings in the wild at one of the last strongholds of the species.

name: Brown Bear Watching - Finland
desc: European brown bears photographed from hides in the Finnish-Russian borderlands.

name: Northern Lights and Whale Watching - Tromso
desc: Orcas and humpbacks chase herring under the aurora borealis near Tromso.

name: Starling Murmuration - Rome
desc: Millions of starlings create mesmerizing aerial murmurations over Rome at dusk.

name: Puffin Colony - Latrabjarg
desc: Europe's largest bird cliff hosting millions of puffins at Iceland's westernmost point.

name: Humpback Migration - Hervey Bay

name: Dwarf Minke Whale Encounters - Ribbon Reefs

name: Cassowary Sightings - Daintree
desc: Endangered southern cassowary in the Daintree Rainforest and Mission Beach area.

name: Platypus Viewing - Eungella
desc: Wild platypus spotted at dawn and dusk in Broken River, Eungella National Park.

name: Glowworm Caves - Waitomo

name: Kiwi Spotting - Stewart Island
desc: Wild brown kiwi forage on Ocean Beach in one of the few places to see kiwi naturally.

name: Albatross Colony - Taiaroa Head
desc: Royal albatross breeding colony on the Otago Peninsula near Dunedin.

name: Resplendent Quetzal Nesting - Monteverde
description: Resplendent quetzals nest in cloud forest avocado trees during breeding season.

name: Scarlet Macaw Gathering - Tambopata
description: Hundreds of macaws and parrots gather at clay licks in the Amazon basin.

name: Sea Lion Colony - San Cristobal
description: Playful Galapagos sea lions lounge on beaches and swim with snorkelers.

name: Horseshoe Crab Spawning - Delaware Bay
description: Millions of horseshoe crabs spawn on Delaware Bay beaches, feeding migrating shorebirds.

name: Macaroni Penguin Colony - Falkland Islands
description: Macaroni penguins with distinctive yellow crests nest in large colonies.

name: Nesting Frigatebirds - Galapagos
description: Male frigatebirds inflate giant red throat pouches to attract mates on North Seymour.

name: Wildebeest Calving - Ngorongoro
description: Wildebeest calving season on the southern Serengeti and Ngorongoro Conservation Area.

name: Crocodile Nesting - Kakadu
description: Saltwater crocodile nesting and hatching season in Kakadu's Yellow Water billabong.

name: Narwhal Migration - Lancaster Sound
description: Narwhals gather in Lancaster Sound, the unicorn of the sea in their Arctic habitat.

name: Walrus Haul-out - Round Island

name: Flamingo Gathering - Celestun
description: American flamingos flock to the Celestun Biosphere Reserve in Yucatan.

name: Arctic Fox Cubs - Hornstrandir
description: Arctic fox families with playful cubs in the remote Hornstrandir nature reserve.

name: Migrating Raptors - Veracruz River of Raptors

name: Harbor Seal Pupping - Point Reyes

name: Harp Seal Pupping - Magdalen Islands
description: Whitecoat harp seal pups on the pack ice of the Gulf of St. Lawrence.
